title: 美國再宣佈一項對台軍售 將出售100套反艦飛彈發射車 以及400枚陸基魚叉反艦飛彈

replies.msg:
WASHINGTON, October 26, 2020 - The State Department has made a determination approving a possible Foreign Military Sale to the Taipei Economic and Cultural Representative Office in the United States (TECRO) of up to one hundred (100) Harpoon Coastal Defense Systems (HCDS) and related equipment for an estimated cost of $2.37 billion.
（100套陸基魚叉反艦飛彈，價值23.7億美元）

...

one hundred (100) Harpoon Coastal Defense Systems (HCDS) consisting of up to four hundred (400) RGM-84L-4 Harpoon Block II Surface Launched Missiles; and four (4) RTM-84L-4 Harpoon Block II Exercise Missiles. Also included are four hundred and eleven (411) containers, one hundred (100) Harpoon Coastal Defense System Launcher Transporter Units
（當中包括400枚RGM-84L-4 Block II反艦飛彈，4枚訓練彈，411個發射箱，100輛發射車）

replies.msg:
潛艇美國話賣既時候台灣冇錢買，到台灣話買既時候美國又唔賣，依家自己造，美國都有幫唔少手預計2024年首艦下水
神盾艦其實台灣會養唔起佢依家4艘Kidd都係做碼頭女皇多，不過如果係買，都係喉住美國頭幾艘神盾驅逐艦，應該七八年內會退役，睇吓到時可唔可以熱艦移交，但係養唔養得起都係問題

one hundred (100) Harpoon Coastal Defense Systems (HCDS) consisting of up to four hundred (400) RGM-84L-4 Harpoon Block II Surface Launched Missiles; and four (4) RTM-84L-4 Harpoon Block II Exercise Missiles.
